subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen, both morn and eventide, is occupied with the remembrance of the friends of God, and at every moment doth the Kawthar of utterance flow forth unto the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در صباح و مساء بذکر دوستان الهی مشغول در هر حین کوثر بیان بر اهل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
